mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp acceleration in monthly CPI inflation above 0.5% signals central bank intervention risks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors price in tighter monetary policy.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPI acceleration, or Rank IC > 0.05 in inflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and rising inflation indicate supply-side shocks that depress corporate margins, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls > 1.0% in 1 month AND CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or the joint effect of INDPRO/CPI signals has Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening labor market, indicated by declining unemployment rates below 4.5%, signals wage pressures that push equity valuations higher through improved corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 in tight labor market periods.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts combined with rising consumer spending (RSAFS) indicate robust demand conditions that drive equity valuations higher, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises > 2.0% in 1 month AND RSAFS rises > 1.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or the joint effect of HOUST/RSAFS has Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in monthly payroll employment signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer spending confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC > 0.05 in employment contraction periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained quarterly growth in GDP above 2.0% indicates strong economic fundamentals that support equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of GDP growth periods, or Rank IC < 0.03 in growth regimes.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above 1.0% monthly signals improving supply chain efficiency and corporate profitability, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 in industrial growth periods.
